outcomes.name: Healthy Life Expectancy Growth (Annualized %)
outcomes.headlineEligibilityReason: Excluded from headline because this outcome is a growth diagnostic.

outcomes.name: After-Tax Median Income (PPP)
outcomes.headlineEligibilityReason: Excluded from headline because directionality is weak and the confound-adjusted pooled signal is not positive.

outcomes.name: After-Tax Median Income Growth (Annualized %)
outcomes.headlineEligibilityReason: Excluded from headline because this outcome is a growth diagnostic.

objectiveFloors.name: Combined Direct Welfare
objectiveFloors.weightingMethod: Composite z-score across selected direct-welfare outcomes, weighted by outcome weights.
objectiveFloors.floorMethod: Lowest per-capita PPP spending bin within 0.35 composite-score units of the best bin.

objectiveFloors.name: Healthy Life Expectancy Only
objectiveFloors.weightingMethod: Composite z-score across selected direct-welfare outcomes, weighted by outcome weights.
objectiveFloors.floorMethod: Lowest per-capita PPP spending bin within 0.35 composite-score units of the best bin.

objectiveFloors.name: Income Proxy Only
objectiveFloors.weightingMethod: Composite z-score across selected direct-welfare outcomes, weighted by outcome weights.
objectiveFloors.floorMethod: Lowest per-capita PPP spending bin within 0.35 composite-score units of the best bin.

toleranceSensitivity.name: Combined Direct Welfare (tol 0.15)
toleranceSensitivity.weightingMethod: Composite z-score across selected direct-welfare outcomes, weighted by outcome weights.
toleranceSensitivity.floorMethod: Lowest per-capita PPP spending bin within 0.15 composite-score units of the best bin.

toleranceSensitivity.name: Combined Direct Welfare (tol 0.35)
toleranceSensitivity.weightingMethod: Composite z-score across selected direct-welfare outcomes, weighted by outcome weights.
toleranceSensitivity.floorMethod: Lowest per-capita PPP spending bin within 0.35 composite-score units of the best bin.

toleranceSensitivity.name: Combined Direct Welfare (tol 0.75)
toleranceSensitivity.weightingMethod: Composite z-score across selected direct-welfare outcomes, weighted by outcome weights.
toleranceSensitivity.floorMethod: Lowest per-capita PPP spending bin within 0.75 composite-score units of the best bin.

sensitivity.note: Start-year sensitivity re-runs the same floor benchmark with different left-window cutoffs; a separate COVID exclusion check drops 2020-2021 source years.

alignment.description: Predictor is measured at year t; outcome summaries are medians over years t+onset through t+duration.

healthyLifeYearsMetric.note: Growth is derived as annualized percent change in HALE.

incomeGrowthMetric.metricUsed: Annualized growth of the best-available after-tax median-income PPP series
incomeGrowthMetric.note: Level series uses OECD direct after-tax disposable income where available and World Bank PIP fallback elsewhere.

binning.method: adaptive quantile bins with anchor constraints

metricNotes: Healthy life years level: WHO Healthy Life Expectancy (HALE).
Healthy life years growth: annualized percent growth of HALE.
Real after-tax median income level: OECD direct after-tax disposable income where available, with World Bank PIP real median-income fallback elsewhere.
Real after-tax median income growth: annualized percent growth of the best-available level series.

overall.weightingMethod: Composite z-score across selected direct-welfare outcomes, weighted by outcome weights.

federalComposition.compositionCaveat: This composition model is federal-budget only; the category table below is constrained to the current federal budget even though standalone category optima sum to a different total.
